commands.command: P7B public forbidden scan for std::future, condition_variable, wait, blocking_result
commands.summary: No blocking token/lifecycle API tokens found in P7 public headers.
CommandToken value semantics and CommandLifecycleSnapshot defaults passed contract test.

allowed_operations_checked: Token is a non-owning value returned by command APIs
Lifecycle state is queryable through PlaybackSession::query_command
forbidden_operations_checked: No hidden command record ownership by CommandToken
exit_criteria_covered: G3 nonblocking command token preliminary coverage
G4 command lifecycle query surface preliminary coverage
not_verified_boundaries: Lifecycle retention windows, tombstones, and late completion handling are P7C/P7D gates
